latin: Senex potentissimus, die nuptiarum filiae suae, hospiti dixit: 'postulatum tuum accipiam. sed fortasse olim — et dies ille numquam veniet — te rogabo ut mihi officium praestes.'

questions.prompt: When does this conversation take place?
questions.target: On the day of his daughter's wedding
choices: On the day of his daughter's wedding

questions.prompt: What does the powerful man imply?
questions.target: He will someday ask for a favor in return
choices: He will someday ask for a favor in return

translation: A most powerful old man, on the day of his daughter's wedding, said to a guest: 'I will accept your request. But perhaps someday — and that day may never come — I will ask you to perform a service for me.'
